title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Xpressbees South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Xpressbees South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Logistics Manager at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Xpressbees South Asia Partners:
Xpressbees South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
